title: Regulatory Authority Profiles
code: list_authorities() #> # A tibble: 6 × 4 #>   authority     full_name                             country n_submission_types #>   <chr>         <chr>                                 <chr>                <int> #> 1 FDA           U.S. Food and Drug Administration     United…                  5 #> 2 EMA           European Medicines Agency             Europe…                  3 #> 3 PMDA          Pharmaceuticals and Medical Devices … Japan                    2 #> 4 Health_Canada Health Canada                         Canada                   2 #> 5 TGA           Therapeutic Goods Administration      Austra…                  2 #> 6 MHRA          Medicines and Healthcare products Re… United…                  2

title: Regulatory Authority Profiles
code: list_submission_types("FDA") #> [1] "IND"   "NDA"   "BLA"   "ANDA"  "505b2" list_submission_types("EMA") #> [1] "CTA"       "MAA"       "variation"

title: Regulatory Authority Profiles
text: submission_profile() returns profile authority-specific pillar weights, decision bands, required indicators:
code: fda_nda <- submission_profile("FDA", "NDA") fda_nda$pillar_weights #>   quality     trace      risk usability  #>      0.35      0.25      0.25      0.15 fda_nda$minimum_coverage #> [1] 0.9 ema_maa <- submission_profile("EMA", "MAA", study_phase = "Phase3") ema_maa$pillar_weights #>   quality     trace      risk usability  #>      0.30      0.25      0.30      0.15

title: Regulatory Authority Profiles
text: FDA NDA vs EMA MAA pillar weights:
code: weights_df <- data.frame(   pillar    = c("quality", "trace", "risk", "usability"),   FDA_NDA   = unname(fda_nda$pillar_weights),   EMA_MAA   = unname(ema_maa$pillar_weights) ) weights_df #>      pillar FDA_NDA EMA_MAA #> 1   quality    0.35    0.30 #> 2     trace    0.25    0.25 #> 3      risk    0.25    0.30 #> 4 usability    0.15    0.15

title: Regulatory Authority Profiles
text: profile_summary() returns tidy tibble summarising profile:
code: profile_summary(fda_nda) #> ℹ Submission Profile: FDA NDA #>   Authority:    U.S. Food and Drug Administration (United States) #>  #>   Pillar Weights: #>     quality     0.35 #>     trace       0.25 #>     risk        0.25 #>     usability   0.15 #>  #>   Decision Bands: #>     ready         [85, 100] #>     minor_gaps    [70, 84] #>     conditional   [50, 69] #>     high_risk     [0, 49] #>  #>   Required Indicators (15): #>     - Q-MISS-VAR #>     - Q-TYPE-MISMATCH #>     - Q-LABEL-LEN #>     - Q-DUP-RECORDS #>     - Q-FORMAT-ERR #>     - T-ORPHAN-VAR #>     - T-TRACE-LEVEL #>     - T-AMBIGUOUS-MAP #>     - T-DERIVATION-DOC #>     - R-HIGH-RPN #>     - R-OPEN-RISK #>     - R-MITIGATION-GAP #>     - U-DEFINE-COMPLETE #>     - U-REVIEWER-NOTE #>     - U-LABEL-QUALITY #>  #>   Required Asset Types: dataset, define, program, validation, spec #>   Minimum Coverage:     90% #>   Default Detectability: 3

title: Regulatory Authority Profiles
text: validate_against_profile() checks evidence table profile’s required indicators asset types: details tibble shows per-requirement status:
code: ev <- data.frame(   run_id           = "run-001",   study_id         = "STUDY01",   asset_type       = c("dataset", "define", "program", "spec"),   asset_id         = c("ADSL", "define.xml", "prod_adsl.R", "ADSL"),   source_name      = "r4subcore",   source_version   = "0.1.2",   indicator_id     = c("Q-001", "Q-002", "R-001", "U-001"),   indicator_name   = c("Quality Check", "Define Check",                        "Program Validation", "Label Quality"),   indicator_domain = c("quality", "quality", "risk", "usability"),   severity         = "info",   result           = "pass",   metric_value     = 1,   metric_unit      = "score",   message          = "Check passed",   location         = c("ADSL", "define.xml", "prod_adsl.R", "ADSL"),   evidence_payload = "{}",   created_at       = Sys.time(),   stringsAsFactors = FALSE )  val <- validate_against_profile(ev, fda_nda) val$is_compliant #> [1] FALSE val$coverage #> [1] 0 val$missing_indicators #>  [1] "Q-MISS-VAR"        "Q-TYPE-MISMATCH"   "Q-LABEL-LEN"       #>  [4] "Q-DUP-RECORDS"     "Q-FORMAT-ERR"      "T-ORPHAN-VAR"      #>  [7] "T-TRACE-LEVEL"     "T-AMBIGUOUS-MAP"   "T-DERIVATION-DOC"  #> [10] "R-HIGH-RPN"        "R-OPEN-RISK"       "R-MITIGATION-GAP"  #> [13] "U-DEFINE-COMPLETE" "U-REVIEWER-NOTE"   "U-LABEL-QUALITY" head(val$details) #> # A tibble: 6 × 2 #>   requirement               status  #>   <chr>                     <chr>   #> 1 indicator:Q-MISS-VAR      missing #> 2 indicator:Q-TYPE-MISMATCH missing #> 3 indicator:Q-LABEL-LEN     missing #> 4 indicator:Q-DUP-RECORDS   missing #> 5 indicator:Q-FORMAT-ERR    missing #> 6 indicator:T-ORPHAN-VAR    missing

title: Regulatory Authority Profiles
text: authorities adjust requirements based study phase. Pass study_phase reflect phase-specific requirements:
code: pmda_nda_p3 <- submission_profile("PMDA", "NDA_JP", study_phase = "Phase3") pmda_nda_p3$pillar_weights #>   quality     trace      risk usability  #>      0.25      0.30      0.25      0.20

title: Authors and Citation

title: Authors and Citation
text: Mali P (2026). r4subprofile: Regulatory Submission Profiles Clinical Submission Readiness. R package version 0.1.1, https://r4sub.github.io/r4subprofile/.
code: @Manual{,   title = {r4subprofile: Regulatory Submission Profiles for Clinical Submission Readiness},   author = {Pawan Rama Mali},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.1.1},   url = {https://r4sub.github.io/r4subprofile/}, }

title: r4subprofile — Regulatory Authority Profiles
text: r4subprofile defines regulatory submission profiles R4SUB clinical submission readiness ecosystem. profile bundles authority-specific pillar weights, decision thresholds, required indicators, risk configuration given regulatory authority submission type.

title: r4subprofile — Regulatory Authority Profiles
code: pak::pak("R4SUB/r4subprofile")

title: r4subprofile — Regulatory Authority Profiles
code: library(r4subprofile)  # Browse authorities list_authorities() list_submission_types("FDA")  # Create a profile prof <- submission_profile("FDA", "NDA") prof$pillar_weights prof$required_indicators  # Extract configs compatible with r4subscore / r4subrisk sci_cfg  <- profile_sci_config(prof) risk_cfg <- profile_risk_config(prof)  # Validate evidence against profile requirements result <- validate_against_profile(evidence, prof) result$is_compliant result$missing_indicators

title: r4subprofile — Regulatory Authority Profiles
code: library(r4subscore) library(r4subprofile)  prof <- submission_profile("FDA", "NDA")  # Use profile weights for SCI computation pillar_scores <- compute_pillar_scores(evidence, config = profile_sci_config(prof)) sci <- compute_sci(pillar_scores, config = profile_sci_config(prof))

title: r4subprofile — Regulatory Authority Profiles

what: Get Required Indicators for a Profile — profile_required_indicators

text: Returns list indicator IDs mandatory given submission profile.

text: profile submission_profile object.

text: character vector required indicator_id values.

title: Get Required Indicators for a Profile — profile_required_indicators
code: prof <- submission_profile("FDA", "NDA") profile_required_indicators(prof) #>  [1] "Q-MISS-VAR"        "Q-TYPE-MISMATCH"   "Q-LABEL-LEN"       #>  [4] "Q-DUP-RECORDS"     "Q-FORMAT-ERR"      "T-ORPHAN-VAR"      #>  [7] "T-TRACE-LEVEL"     "T-AMBIGUOUS-MAP"   "T-DERIVATION-DOC"  #> [10] "R-HIGH-RPN"        "R-OPEN-RISK"       "R-MITIGATION-GAP"  #> [13] "U-DEFINE-COMPLETE" "U-REVIEWER-NOTE"   "U-LABEL-QUALITY"    prof_ind <- submission_profile("FDA", "IND") profile_required_indicators(prof_ind) #> [1] "Q-MISS-VAR"        "Q-TYPE-MISMATCH"   "T-TRACE-LEVEL"     #> [4] "R-HIGH-RPN"        "U-DEFINE-COMPLETE"

title: Extract Risk Configuration from a Profile — profile_risk_config
code: prof <- submission_profile("FDA", "NDA") cfg <- profile_risk_config(prof) cfg$rpn_bands #> $critical #> [1]  80 125 #>  #> $high #> [1] 40 79 #>  #> $medium #> [1] 15 39 #>  #> $low #> [1]  1 14 #>

what: r4subprofile: Regulatory Submission Profiles for Clinical Submission Readiness — r4subprofile-package
title: r4subprofile: Regulatory Submission Profiles for Clinical Submission Readiness — r4subprofile-package
text: Defines submission profiles per regulatory authority authority-specific pillar weights, decision thresholds, indicator requirements, risk configuration. Supports FDA, EMA, PMDA, Health Canada, TGA, MHRA. Integrates 'r4subscore' 'r4subrisk' configuration systems.

title: r4subprofile: Regulatory Submission Profiles for Clinical Submission Readiness — r4subprofile-package
text: Maintainer: Pawan Rama Mali prm@outlook.

title: Create a Submission Profile — submission_profile
text: Constructs regulatory submission profile authority-specific pillar weights, decision bands, required indicators, risk configuration.

title: Create a Submission Profile — submission_profile
code: submission_profile(authority, submission_type, study_phase = NULL)

title: Create a Submission Profile — submission_profile
text: authority Character. Regulatory authority name (e.g., "FDA", "EMA"). See list_authorities() supported values. submission_type Character. Submission type authority (e.g., "NDA", "MAA"). See list_submission_types() valid values. study_phase Character NULL. Optional study phase (e.g., "Phase1", "Phase2", "Phase3", "Phase4"). Currently informational.

title: Create a Submission Profile — submission_profile
text: list class "submission_profile" elements: authority, full_name, country, submission_type, study_phase, pillar_weights, bands, required_indicators, required_asset_types, minimum_coverage, rpn_bands, default_detectability.

title: Create a Submission Profile — submission_profile
code: prof <- submission_profile("FDA", "NDA") prof$pillar_weights #>   quality     trace      risk usability  #>      0.35      0.25      0.25      0.15  prof$required_indicators #>  [1] "Q-MISS-VAR"        "Q-TYPE-MISMATCH"   "Q-LABEL-LEN"       #>  [4] "Q-DUP-RECORDS"     "Q-FORMAT-ERR"      "T-ORPHAN-VAR"      #>  [7] "T-TRACE-LEVEL"     "T-AMBIGUOUS-MAP"   "T-DERIVATION-DOC"  #> [10] "R-HIGH-RPN"        "R-OPEN-RISK"       "R-MITIGATION-GAP"  #> [13] "U-DEFINE-COMPLETE" "U-REVIEWER-NOTE"   "U-LABEL-QUALITY"    prof_ema <- submission_profile("EMA", "MAA", study_phase = "Phase3") prof_ema$bands #> $ready #> [1]  85 100 #>  #> $minor_gaps #> [1] 70 84 #>  #> $conditional #> [1] 50 69 #>  #> $high_risk #> [1]  0 49 #>

what: Validate Evidence Against a Submission Profile — validate_against_profile
title: Validate Evidence Against a Submission Profile — validate_against_profile
text: Checks whether evidence table meets requirements specified regulatory submission profile: required indicators present, required asset types covered, minimum indicator coverage met.

title: Validate Evidence Against a Submission Profile — validate_against_profile
code: validate_against_profile(evidence, profile)

title: Validate Evidence Against a Submission Profile — validate_against_profile
text: evidence validated evidence data.frame conforming r4subcore evidence schema. profile submission_profile object.

title: Validate Evidence Against a Submission Profile — validate_against_profile
text: list class "profile_validation" elements: is_compliant: logical; TRUE requirements met missing_indicators: character vector missing required indicator IDs missing_asset_types: character vector missing required asset types coverage: numeric; fraction required indicators present (0-1) coverage_met: logical; whether coverage meets minimum threshold details: tibble per-requirement status

title: Validate Evidence Against a Submission Profile — validate_against_profile
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ prof <- submission_profile("FDA", "NDA") result <- validate_against_profile(evidence, prof) result$is_compliant result$missing_indicators } # }
